description: Push code to main branch, monitor GitHub Actions build, and fix any CI/CD failures until the build succeeds and releases are created.
steps: Step 1: Commit all files and push to main branch using git username giangnam0201
Step 2: Wait for GitHub Actions workflow to trigger and complete
Step 3: If workflow fails, check logs, identify issues, fix them, and push again
Step 4: Repeat until all builds pass and a release is created with APK, EXE, and Web zip artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Code is pushed to main branch on GitHub
A GitHub Release is created with APK, Windows EXE, and Web zip artifacts
verification: Check GitHub Actions workflow status shows success
Verify release exists with all three platform artifacts
